title: StreamInterface
content:
# StreamInterface

Inherits from: ABC


Interface for a connection to a Kelvin system. Provides raw read/write access.


## Methods


### async connect() -> None


### async disconnect() -> None

Disconnects from the Kelvin Stream


### async read() -> Message


### async write(msg: Message) -> bool
summary: Interface for a connection to a Kelvin system. Provides raw read/write access.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.application import StreamInterface

# Usage example
app = StreamInterface()
